title: stelis dolabrata
intro: Stelis dolabrata, also known as Macho, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stelis dolabrata include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, arthritis, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
